Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Ramon Estevez And Upper V Management Group Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Lawrence D. Murray of the law offices of Murray & Associates (415-673-0555) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation to judge pro tem is signed and filed. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BROKERAGE, INC. DBA TREASURE ISLAND EVENT's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Ramon Estevez And Upper V Management Group Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's answer will be stricken; defendant has failed to comply with a previous order of this court and good grounds exist for imposing terminating sanctions. Defendant is ordered to pay to plaintiff and its counsel the sum of $2500.00, payment to be made within ten (10) day from the date of this order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
